---
title: ""
page-layout: full
format: html
---


<div class="contact-container">

<div class="contact-image">
<img src="images/IMG_3833.png">
</div>

<div class="contact-text">

# Contact

I'd love to connect! Whether it's about geomatics, remote sensing, environmental work, or potential collaborations, feel free to reach out.

### Email  
<a href="mailto:pritty.arattu@gmail.com">pritty.arattu@gmail.com</a>

### LinkedIn  
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pritty-arattu-51b334149/" target="_blank">
linkedin.com/in/pritty-arattu-51b334149
</a>

### GitHub  
<a href="https://github.com/PrittyArattu" target="_blank">
github.com/PrittyArattu
</a>

### Location  
Vancouver, Canada

</div>

</div>
